mapper.select: select a.id,a.slug,a.title,a.summary,a.cover_image as coverUrl,c.name as categoryName,ifnull(v.like_count,0) as likeCount,ifnull(v.comment_count,0) as commentCount,ifnull(v.share_count,0) as shareCount,ifnull(v.view_count,0) as viewCount from articles a join categories c on c.id=a.category_id left join v_article_stats v on v.article_id=a.id where a.status='published' and c.status='published' order by a.published_at desc limit #{limit}
select count(*) from articles a join categories c on c.id=a.category_id where a.status='published' and c.status='published' and c.slug=#{slug}

select a.id,a.slug,a.title,a.summary,a.published_at as publishedAt from articles a join categories c on c.id=a.category_id where a.status='published' and c.status='published' and c.slug=#{slug} order by a.published_at desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}

select a.id,a.slug,a.title,a.summary,a.content,a.cover_image as coverUrl,c.id as categoryId,c.name as categoryName,c.slug as categorySlug,ifnull(v.like_count,0) as likeCount,ifnull(v.comment_count,0) as commentCount,ifnull(v.share_count,0) as shareCount,a.view_count as viewCount from articles a join categories c on c.id=a.category_id left join v_article_stats v on v.article_id=a.id where a.slug=#{slug} and a.status='published' and c.status='published' limit 1
select source_name as sourceName,source_url as sourceUrl,source_type as sourceType,license_note as licenseNote from article_sources where article_id=#{articleId}
mapper.update: update articles set view_count=view_count+1 where id=#{articleId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from article_likes where article_id=#{articleId}
select count(*) from comments where article_id=#{articleId} and status='visible'
select count(*) from article_shares where article_id=#{articleId}
select view_count from articles where id=#{articleId}
